title: schizoglossum atropurpureum
intro: Schizoglossum atropurpureum, also known as the Violet Ball, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizoglossum atropurpureum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices, and is sometimes combined with other herbs for its purported health benefits.
